name: Uninsured employer after my injury - options?

mainEntity.name: Uninsured employer after my injury - options?

acceptedAnswer.description: Utah Uninsured Employer Fund covers; sue employer too.[2] Context: Employers must carry insurance; penalties apply.[2] Key factors: Prove no coverage; fund has limits. Practical guidance: Verify policy first; file dual claims. Fund slower. Lawyer accelerates.
